title: Is there tie-off support for AUTOINST?
body:
Hi, I've inherited some code which has the following AUTOINST tie-off lisp command.  Is this standard or could it have been some custom lisp?  The latest verilog-mode doesn't seem to recognise it and I can't find anything in the documentation.

```
/* module_name AUTO_TEMPLATE (
  .in_sig (@"(tie-off)"),
); */
```

It seems to leave outputs unconnected and drives unused inputs to `{WIDTH{1'b0}}`.

Cheers.
